title: Sparkle: Reforge
description: Allow some items, blocks, and entities to emit flickering particles.
body:
This mod is a Forge port version of [Sparkle](https://modrinth.com/mod/sparkle)

Retained all the features of the original mod and recast it on Forge.

This mod can make some blocks, dropped items, and entities emit sparkling particle effects. If you want specific blocks, dropped items, or entities to have this effect, you can configure it by finding "spark.json" in the config folder of the game directory.
